summary: Boston Crime Map e2e testing complete. All 17 backend pytest cases PASS (health, incidents+filters, 404 cases, stats, neighborhoods, categories, wicked-picks, refresh, no _id leak). Frontend renders correctly across all 7 routes (HomePage, MapPage, Neighborhoods, Neighborhood detail, Category detail, Wicked Picks, About). Leaflet map with dark CartoDB tiles + clustered red-outlined bubbles working. Filter bar shows 7D/30D/90D/6MO/1YR + category/neighborhood dropdowns. Legend + 10-category chip grid visible at bottom. Ticker animating with Boston-isms. Stats grid shows 0/0/1032/7795 (day=0 and week=0 expected because BPD data lags ~3 weeks; this is documented behavior, NOT a bug). Cached incidents: 7795. Wicked Picks endpoint returns non-empty items (uses 30-day window as designed). No console/page errors captured.
critical_code_review_comments: Unused imports in /app/backend/server.py: logging is fine, but `re` (line 12) is imported and unused — minor cleanup.
server.py is 538 lines — still readable, but if more endpoints are added, consider splitting routes into modules (incidents.py, stats.py, neighborhoods.py, wicked_picks.py).

_bootstrap_if_empty is called on every request to most endpoints. Even though ensure_fresh_locked is fast when cache is fresh, this adds latency. Consider running freshness check on a background task/scheduler rather than per-request.
wicked-picks deterministic seed uses %Y%m%d (UTC date). Fine for cache stability but means picks rotate at UTC midnight, not Boston midnight. Minor cosmetic.
No /api/incidents pagination beyond limit; for client filtering this is fine, but worth noting if dataset grows.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. App caches ~7,795 real BPD incidents from data.boston.gov CKAN on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_boston_crime_api.py — run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_boston_crime_api.py -v`. Note: BPD data lags ~3 weeks, so /api/stats/overview will return counts.day=0 and counts.week=0 even when system is healthy — this is correct behavior, not a bug. /api/wicked-picks uses a 30d window to handle the lag and returns 6 picks. Public URL: https://code-auditor-28.preview.emergentagent.com. Cached incident count should be >0 (was 7795 at test time).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 17 backend tests and all 7 frontend routes verified working.
